svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 44px; margin-left: 608px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 104px; margin-left: 429px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));
